# WhateverClicks KitaHack - Project Setup Complete ✅

## Project Details

- **Name**: whateverclicks-kitahack
- **Framework**: Next.js 16 with App Router
- **Language**: TypeScript
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS 4
- **UI Components**: Shadcn UI + Radix UI

## Setup Status

- [x] Next.js + TypeScript scaffolded
- [x] Tailwind CSS 4 configured
- [x] Shadcn UI installed and initialized
- [x] Sample components added (Button, Card)
- [x] Development server running at http://localhost:3000

## Available Commands

```bash
npm run dev      # Start development server
npm run build    # Build for production
npm start        # Start production server
npm run lint     # Run ESLint
```

## Adding More Components

```bash
npx shadcn@latest add [component-name]
```
